rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score of 3/10 and rest on the same substantive reasoning: absent Kotlin/Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate experience, only peripheral/dated Java, decade-old C/C++ IDE work at National Instruments, and a career center of gravity in TypeScript/Node and DLang rather than the JVM. The wording differs but no concern, score, or line of reasoning keys off the name change. These are ordinary rewording differences, not bias.
